core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Replace throwing a RuntimeException when a port reservation fails with silently adding the port to the reserved set to prevent startup failures.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.before: throw new RuntimeException("Unable to reserve previously set port " + property + " for port name " + propertyName);

core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Correct the loop to iterate over the current class in the hierarchy traversal instead of the original class.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace the manual RestTemplate bean configuration with an OpenAPI-generated PetApi client bean.
Inject a base URL from configuration properties to configure the API client.
Add SLF4J logger instance for logging client configuration details.
Replace manual RestTemplate usage with a generated OpenAPI client (PetApi) to simplify HTTP interaction and type safety.
Remove imports related to the removed RestTemplate and URI handling logic.
Add imports for the generated Pet API client and models used in the new implementation.
Remove the @Value injection for the URL since the generated client handles configuration internally.
Change the exception type from generic Exception to specific ApiException thrown by the generated client.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.before: public Pet addPet(String name) throws Exception
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.after: public Pet addPet(String name) throws ApiException

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace manual RequestEntity construction with direct object population and API call.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with modern Spring Framework standards.
Simplify Mockito stubbing by using static import for any() and removing redundant parentheses around the method call.
Explicitly specify the path attribute in the @MockEndpoint annotation to ensure correct endpoint mapping.
Update imports to use static imports for matchers and adjust package references for model classes.
Add new test cases and improve existing ones to verify mock interactions and exception handling.
Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE as the former was removed in Spring Framework 6.1+.
examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.why_exists: Compile error: APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE is removed in Spring Framework 6.1+ (required for Spring Boot 3.2+/4.0+).

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Specify the base path for the mocked endpoint to align with updated API routing or framework requirements.
Wrap service call in try-catch to handle ApiException thrown by the updated client library on error responses.
examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.why_exists: Runtime exception: The updated client library throws ApiException on non-2xx responses instead of returning null, causing unhandled exception failure in tests.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Update import for Pet model to reflect package restructuring in the generated API client.
examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.why_exists: Compile error: Class org.openapitools.model.Pet not found due to package rename in generated sources.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Add import for ApiException to support the new exception handling logic.
examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.why_exists: Compile error: ApiException cannot be resolved without import.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update import statement to use the new Jetty 12/EE10 package structure for WebAppContext.
jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.why_exists: The class org.eclipse.jetty.webapp.WebAppContext does not exist in Jetty 12 (EE10); it has been moved to org.eclipse.jetty.ee10.webapp.WebAppContext. Without this change, the code fails to compile with 'cannot find symbol'.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update the array type reference for Configuration to use the new Jetty 12/EE10 package.
jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.why_exists: The class org.eclipse.jetty.webapp.Configuration does not exist in Jetty 12 (EE10); it has been moved to org.eclipse.jetty.ee10.webapp.Configuration. Without this change, the code fails to compile with 'cannot find symbol'.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update imports to use the new Jetty 12 (ee10) package structure.
jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.why_exists: The old package org.eclipse.jetty.webapp does not exist in Jetty 12, causing a compile error (class not found).

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Add explicit super constructor call with a Builder instance to satisfy Jetty 12 API changes.
jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.why_exists: Jetty 12 AbstractConfiguration likely requires a Builder or specific initialization in the constructor; omitting super() or using the wrong signature causes a compile error or runtime initialization failure.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update imports and usage to use the new Jetty 12 (EE10) package structure and ServletContextApi interface.
jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.why_exists: The old Jetty 11 packages (org.eclipse.jetty.servlet, org.eclipse.jetty.webapp) and the ContextHandler.Context API do not exist in Jetty 12, causing compilation errors. Jetty 12 moved to the 'ee10' namespace and changed the ServletContext implementation to ServletContextApi.

BeforeEachCallback, AfterEachCallback, BeforeTestExecutionCallback, AfterTestExecutionCallback, AutoCloseable {

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Add close method to destroy the server instance as part of AutoCloseable implementation.
Register the extension instance in the global store to allow access across test contexts.
Add a static flag to track if the extension has been started to prevent duplicate registration.

junit5/jetty/src/test/java/com/github/sk.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x standards.
junit5/jetty/src/test/java/com/github/sk.why_exists: MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE was removed in Spring Framework 6.0, causing a compilation error if used.

junit5/jetty/src/test/java/com/github/sk.general_idea: Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with the standard APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE constant.
junit5/jetty/src/test/java/com/github/sk.why_exists: The constant MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8 was removed in Spring Framework 6.1 (and earlier in some contexts), causing a compilation error if referenced.
